youtube.title: Generative AI Interview Q11: Billion-Scale RAG for Financial Insights #Shorts
youtube.description: Designing an autonomous financial research agent on GCP involves orchestrating several services for billion-scale RAG. Raw financial documents like earnings transcripts and SEC filings are stored in Cloud Storage and processed into BigQuery, then indexed into Vertex AI Vector Search. The Vertex AI Agent Engine leverages Gemini 3.1 Pro for multi-step reasoning, retrieving relevant context from Vector Search via RAG before generating actionable financial insights. Pub/Sub and Dataflow manage the ingestion pipeline, while Vertex AI Evaluation ensures response quality, all monitored via Cloud Monitoring and Logging for security. This robust architecture enables real-time analysis of vast financial data, providing unparalleled intelligence for market decisions. Subscribe for daily Cloud Architect breakdowns.
